case_title: JONATHAN LAHRMAN DIXON VS. IG DEVELOPMENT, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIXON, JONATHAN LAHRMAN AS TO DEFENDANT IG DEVELOPMENT, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIXON, JONATHAN LAHRMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IG DEVELOPMENT, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $16,581.59 PRINCIPAL, $140.94 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,023.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
